characters.name: Abraham Douglas
characters.description: Abraham DouglasIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBlackBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceCanadaNationalityCanadianFamilyMarital StatusMarriedSpouse(s)Wife - TheresaChildren2 DaughtersCareerRankSergeantBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byBeau BillingsleaAppeared inWar of the Worlds: Goliath Abraham Douglas- also known asSergeant Abraham Douglasor simply as 'Abe'- is one of the main characters in the movie "War of the Worlds: Goliath". Born in Canada, Abraham has a wife named Teresa and two young daughters. He is shown to be a humble, respectful and caring man who prioritizes his family and friends over himself, such as passing off having another drink at The Green Man as he'd promised Teresa and his daughters that he would be home early. However, when theMartiansreturn, Abraham proves to be a strong, determined and proficient fighter forA.R.E.S.

characters.description: AmyIdentitySpeciesHumanGenderFemaleBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceIndiaNationalityEnglishFamilyChildrenGeorge Junior (son)CareerKey AdvisorsDog - BennyBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byEleanor TomlinsonAppeared inThe War of the Worlds (BBC mini-series) Amyis the female protagonist of the BBC'sThe War of the Worlds mini-series. Her father worked on the survey in India where she was raised until coming to England. She metGeorgeat a meeting for free thinkers and he eventually left his wife for her.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: Beth has only appeared inJeff Wayne's Musical Version of The War of the Worldsand the second musical adaptation "Jeff Wayne's Musical Version of The War of the Worlds: The New Generation". Beth isParson Nathaniel's wife. She is proud of Nathaniel and - despite his delirious state in which he believes she is a devil and that the Martians are demons who have come for humanity's souls - tries to help him and keep his spirit up; declaring there must always be something worth trying, fighting and even dying for as there must be hope for all humanity within man's spirit. However, Beth is eventually killed when a cylinder falls on the house they are hiding in - crushing her under the rubble - with Parson Nathaniel initially confused as to why Satan had 'taken one of his own', before later sinking into despair when he realized that she had died.

characters.name: Captain Sakai
characters.description: Captain SakaiIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBlackBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceJapanNationalityJapaneseCareerRankCaptainBehind the scenes informationAppeared inWar of the Worlds: Goliath Sakai- also known asCaptain Sakai(his first name is not revealed, but in the tie in novel it was said to be Tadeo) - is a Samurai warrior from Japan who emigrated to America to joinA.R.E.Safter the first failed invasion of theMartiansin 1899. Although little is revealed about him, Sakai was one of the highest ranking officers during the training at A.R.E.S - with him been assigned as the leader of Red Team for the planned War Game after it was learned that the Martians would likely be returning. According toRaja Iskandar Shah, Sakai's battle strategy during the War Game would mirror that of his Samurai strategy; attacking full force in the center of his opponent's line.

characters.name: Clayton Forrester
characters.description: Clayton ForresterDr. Clayton Forrester andSylvia Van Buren, as they appeared during the events of the 1953 invasion.General InformationFeature FilmsThe War of the WorldsTelevision ProgramsWar of the WorldsPortrayed byGene Barry.Character informationOccupationScientistAffiliationsPacific TechGoalSurvive the attack from the aliensRelativesHarrison Blackwood(Adopted son)AlliesSylvia Van Buren(love interest)Matthew Collins (deceased)General MannEnemiesMartiansFateSurvived the attack from the Martians.Doctor Clayton Forresteris one of the main characters in the 1953 film adaptation ofThe War of the Worlds. According to the TV series that followed the film, Forrester adoptedHarrison Blackwoodas a boy after he was orphaned in the alien invasion. Harrison would go on to follow in Forrester's work regarding the aliens. While the novelisation of "The Resurrection" features Forrester as alive before succumbing to a heart attack as a renewed resistance to the aliens initialised, a statement made by Harrison in "Thy Kingdom Come" implies that Forrester has been deceased for quite some time prior to the events of the series.

characters.name: Deadite Martians
characters.description: TheDeadite Martiansappeared only in the two-part comicEvil Dead 2: Revenge of the Martians, in which the events of thenovelwere real and theMartianslaunched a global attack before been killed byEarth'sbacteria. In the comic, an experiment involving theNecronomicon Ex MortisatArea 54- which also housed three deceased Martians along with threeFighting-machines- unleashes Kandarian Demons from the book, which proceed to possess the bodies of the deceased Martians; reviving them as Deadites who quickly escape their confines and regain control of their machines. The Deadite Martians have a beak and are green in colour, with it stated that the Martian bodies were 'perfectly preserved' so it isn't clear whether this is their natural body colour. However, as the transformation of a living/deceased human into a deadite often results in the the human becoming disfigured/mutated in a variety of ways, it can be assumed the Deadite Martians have undergone a similar process and differ in appearance from their un-possessed form. As a result of their resurrection into Deadites due to being possessed by the Kandarian Demons, the Martians have full access to all their memories and knowledge - thus allowing them to resume piloting their Tripods. Additionally as a result of the Kandarian Demon's possession, the Deadite Martians can speak aloud in fluent English and can recognize "The Chosen One" - regardless of whether it is the real Ash Williams or his Simulacrum copy.

characters.name: Dimitri Kushnirov
characters.description: Dimitri KushnirovIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceRussiaNationalityRussianFamilyMother(Deceased)FatherSergei KushnirovSibling(s)Sister (Deceased)CareerOccupationHelmsmanRankLieutenantBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byGavin YapAppeared inWar of the Worlds: Goliath Dimitri Kushnirov- also known asLieutenant Dimitri Kushnirov- was a Russian soldier originally from St. Petersburg and the son ofGeneral Sergei Kushnirov- one of the high ranking leaders of theAllied Resistance Earth Squadron(A.R.E.S). Dimitri was a survivor of the first War of the Worlds during theMartian'sattack on Russia, although he lost his younger sister and his mother in the conflict - with only himself and his father Sergei surviving the war as the Martians succumbed toEarth'sbacteria. At some point, he and his father emigrated to the United States and joined A.R.E.S - with Dimitri becoming a Lieutenant and notably becoming the Helmsman of theDreadnought class Battle ZeppelinLeviathanunder the command of his father.

characters.name: Dimitri Kushnirov
characters.description: Dimitri KushnirovIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceRussiaNationalityRussianFamilyMother(Deceased)FatherSergei KushnirovSibling(s)Sister (Deceased)CareerOccupationHelmsmanRankLieutenantBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byGavin YapAppeared inWar of the Worlds: Goliath Dimitri Kushnirov- also known asLieutenant Dimitri Kushnirov- was a Russian soldier originally from St. Petersburg and the son ofGeneral Sergei Kushnirov- one of the high ranking leaders of theAllied Resistance Earth Squadron(A.R.E.S). Dimitri was a survivor of the first War of the Worlds during theMartian'sattack on Russia, although he lost his younger sister and his mother in the conflict - with only himself and his father Sergei surviving the war as the Martians succumbed toEarth'sbacteria. At some point, he and his father emigrated to the United States and joined A.R.E.S - with Dimitri becoming a Lieutenant and notably becoming the Helmsman of theDreadnought class Battle ZeppelinLeviathanunder the command of his father.

characters.name: Eric Wells
characters.description: Eric WellsIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBrownBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceGreat BritainNationalityEnglishFamilyMother(Deceased)Father(Deceased)CareerRankCaptainBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byAlexander Henderson (Child)Peter Wingfield (Adult)Appeared inWar of the Worlds: GoliathEric Wells- also known asCaptain Eric Wells- is one of the main characters and the main protagonist in the movie "War of the Worlds: Goliath". As a child in his hometown of Leeds, England, he witnessed and survived theFirst Martian Invasionin 1899 but was orphaned when his parents were vaporized by a Martian'sHeat-Rayshortly before the invaders succumbed toEarth'sbacteria. Peter Wingfield (Adult) In 1914, he is a member ofA.R.E.S.and is a Captain in the organization's Battle Tripod Corps. He commands anAchilles-Class Battle Tripod "Goliath"withJennifer Carter,Raja Iskandar Shah,Abraham Douglas, andPatrick O'Brien. Prior to his adult life, Eric was a very happy child, leading a very happy life with his parents. Upon witnessing his parents' deaths at the hands of the martians however, caused him to grow a personal vendetta against the same creatures which killed his family. The events in his life however also left him with some PTSD, which would cause him to have flashbacks to his time as a child, witnessing the atrocities that the martians caused on Earth prior to their defeat. Eric however maintained a strong hatred for the martians, so much so, that he would be willing to disregard orders recalling him back to his country of origin. He also had a hatred for nation leaders who recalled A.R.E.S troops back home, as this diminished their forces significantly and he believed that the security of Earth was jeopardized due to politicians wanting their armies to fight and kill each other, rather than protect against the martian threat. Eric is a fierce and loyal commander and is willing to put his life on the line for those who he calls his comrades, as well as those in need.

characters.name: General Sergei Kushnirov
characters.description: General Sergei KushnirovIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.Nickname(s)The GeneralSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorBlackBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceRussiaNationalityRussianFamilyMarital StatusWidowerSpouse(s)Wife (Deceased)ChildrenSon -  DimitriDaughter (Deceased)CareerRankGeneralBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byRob MiddletonAppeared inWar of the Worlds: Goliath Daughter (Deceased) Sergei Kushnirov- also known asGeneral Serge Kushnirovor simply as"The General"- was a Russian soldier originally from St. Petersburg and one of the high ranking leaders of theAllied Resistance Earth Squadron(A.R.E.S). "Whenever someone asked me whether I believed in heaven or hell. I tell them I don't know about heaven...... but on hell, I'm an expert."- General Sergei Kushnirov to Captain Eric Welles. General Sergei Kushnirov is a man with a tragic past, having lost his wife and daughter to the Martians years back in 1899, caused him to earn a hatred towards the Martians, because of how the Martians see humans as nothing more than weakling primitives. When facing the Martians in battle he is a brilliant strategist and expert tactician, especially when in many situations, he always remains calm, cool-headed, strategic, and courageous (even in the face of death).

characters.description: GeorgeIdentitySpeciesHumanGenderMaleBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceGreat BritainNationalityEnglishFamilySibling(s)Brother - FredMarital StatusEstrangedSpouse(s)Wife - Lucy (See other relatives)ChildrenGeorge Junior (son)Other relativesCousin - Lucy (See spouse)CareerOccupationJournalistKey AdvisorsDog - BennyBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byRafe SpallAppeared inThe War of the Worlds (BBC mini-series) Georgeis the male protagonist in the BBC'sThe War of the Worlds mini-series. While working as a journalist for the London Daily Chronicle he metAmyat a meeting for free thinkers and eventually left Lucy for her.

characters.name: Green Martians
characters.description: The Green Martiansare a race of humanoid reptiles fromMars, which they call "Barsoom", with them first appearing in the bookA Princess of MarsbyEdgar Rice Burroughs(The first in theBarsoom series). The Males are 15 feet tall while the females are 12 feet tall, with the Green Martians notably having four arms and with eyes on the side of their head. In terms of their culture and personality, the Green Martians are warlike, barbaric and nomadic. They enjoy torturing others, don't form families, have no concept of private property and have little concept of friendship or love.

characters.name: Green Martians

characters.name: Harlan Ogilvy
characters.description: Harlan OgilvyHarlan OgilvyGeneral InformationFeature FilmsThe War of the WorldsPortrayed byTim RobbinsCharacter informationFateKilled byRay FerrierHarlan Ogilvyis a character featured in the2005 film adaptation ofThe War of the Worlds. While the character shares his name with that ofOgilvy, a character in the original novel, he is a combination of that of theArtillerymanand thecurate. His first name is a reference to author Harlan Ellison. WhenRay Ferrierand his daughterRachelflee a pitch battle between the military and thetripods, Harlan calls to them from an abandoned farmhouse and offers them shelter from the carnage. Harlan explains that he has theorised that the aliens had buried their technology there millions of years ago and that he and Ray can deduce their weakness by observing them, as their refuge is right in the middle of an alien camp. He offers to look after Rachel in the event that Ray is killed and tries to console Ray about the apparent death of his sonRobbie, but Ray insists that Robbie is still alive. The three successfully hide from an alien probe, apparently undetected, for two days.

characters.name: Harrison Blackwood
characters.description: Harrison BlackwoodBlackwood as he appears in season 1General InformationTelevision ProgramsWar of the WorldsTV seriesPortrayed byJared Martin(Adult)Amos Crawley(Child -Time to Reap)Character informationRelativesMatthew Collins (adoptive granduncle) (deceased)Clayton Forrester(adoptive father)(deceased)Sylvia Van Buren(adoptive mother)Harrison Blackwoodis a Astrophysicist and the male protagonist of theWar of the WorldsTV series. He was played byJared Martinin the series and Amos Crawley as a child. He is a member ofThe Blackwood Projectwhich is named after him. Clayton Forrester(adoptive father)(deceased)Sylvia Van Buren(adoptive mother) Blackwood was at one time apparently involved in a relationship with a woman name Charlotte. She was evidently waiting for him to propose marriage.but was frustrated by his eccentricity and casual persona while Charlotte was a more traditional, conservative, socialite.

characters.description: Harrison BlackwoodBlackwood as he appears in season 1General InformationTelevision ProgramsWar of the WorldsTV seriesPortrayed byJared Martin(Adult)Amos Crawley(Child -Time to Reap)Character informationRelativesMatthew Collins (adoptive granduncle) (deceased)Clayton Forrester(adoptive father)(deceased)Sylvia Van Buren(adoptive mother)Harrison Blackwoodis a Astrophysicist and the male protagonist of theWar of the WorldsTV series. He was played byJared Martinin the series and Amos Crawley as a child. He is a member ofThe Blackwood Projectwhich is named after him. Clayton Forrester(adoptive father)(deceased)Sylvia Van Buren(adoptive mother) Blackwood was at one time apparently involved in a relationship with a woman name Charlotte. She was evidently waiting for him to propose marriage.but was frustrated by his eccentricity and casual persona while Charlotte was a more traditional, conservative, socialite.

characters.name: Hither People
characters.description: The Hither People- also known as just "The Hither" - are a race of alien humanoids fromMars. They first appeared in the 1905 novelLieut. Gullivar Jones: His VacationbyEdwin Lester Arnold- which would be his last (and most famous) book. In terms of appearance, the Hither People's clothing is modelled after traditional Arabic culture while the Hither are mostly said to be from a settlement in the ancient ruins of Varnal - the "Green City". The Hither People appear in the crossover comicThe League of Extraordinary Gentlemen, Volume II- under the command of Gullivar Jones and John Carter and as part of a coalition of Martian races (which also includes theGreen Martiansand theSorns) that take part to drive off a group of technologically advanced aliens called theMolluscs- who invaded Mars years ago and have wrought death and destruction since their arrival.

characters.name: Jennifer Carter
characters.description: Jennifer CarterIdentityAffiliationA.R.E.S.SpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorGreenHair colorBlondBackgroundHomeworldEarthBirthplaceUnited StatesNationalityAmericanCareerRankLieutenantBehind the scenes informationPortrayed byElizabeth GracenAppeared inWar of the Worlds: GoliathJennifer Carter- also known asLieutenant Jennifer Carter- is one of the main characters in the movie "War of the Worlds: Goliath". She is ocassionally hit on by fellow soldierPatrick O'Brien, but she brushes him off as she instead is in love with CaptainEric Wells. Originating from the United States, Jennifer comes from a wealthy family as her father is the owner of two railroads. However, her relationship with her father is strained as her father viewed her as his 'property' - to be what he wanted her to be, to marry whom he wanted her to marry, etc. Jennifer states that she saw the situation differently and set out on her own path; joiningA.R.E.Sand awaiting the day of theMartian'sreturn.

characters.name: Killraven
characters.description: Killraven - War of the Worlds Killraven- real nameJonathan Raven- is aMarvel comicscharacter from a parallel version of the mainstreamEarth-616universe known asEarth-691,in which theMartiansfirst invadedEarthin 1901 but were beaten by Earth's bacteria before launching a second, successful invasion of Earth in 2001 - in which they were not only immune to Earth's bacteria but also were able to decimate humanity's supplies of atomic weaponry. The story itself takes place between 2018 and 2020, with the Earth now a vastly different place and Jonathan Raven - now known by the name "Killraven", which he gained from fighting in Gladitorial combat for the Martian's entertainment - leading a group of 'Freemen' to liberate Earth from the Martians and the Martian's various mutant forces that they've created. (TBA)

characters.name: Lex Luthor
characters.description: Lex Luthor- also known asDoctor Lex Luthor- is a character from theDC Comicscrossover storySuperman: War of the Worlds. He is portrayed both in his classical role as an antagonist toSupermanbut also as a protagonist in the comic story. Much like his prominent comic book incarnations, Lex Luthor is shown as being callous, ruthless and hungry for power. However, he is also a brilliant scientist and an intelligent man, which helped him not only survive the War of the Worlds but also aid humanity to quicken its end. Lex Luthor's first appearance.

characters.name: Lord Garrick
characters.description: To DrinkWater  Lord Garrickis a minor character isH.G. Wells' 1898 novelThe War of the Worlds. He was the Chief Justice ofEnglandduring theMartianInvasionofEarthin1898. He was caught in the midst ofthe massesfleeing fromLondonunable to findwaterto drink. He made his first and only appearance isThe Exodus from London. He is based on the real lifeCharles Russell.

characters.name: Malzor
characters.description: Malzor was a male member of the Morthren species who had lived a harmonious and peaceful existence on their homeworld of Morthrai. He was considered one of the top scientists among his people as well as chosen successor to serve as the next leader of the Morthren. Together, Malzor and his wife, Tila, made a discovery that the power of their homeworld's energy rich crystals could be harvested. With this new found level of power their race could, to a limited extent, travel the stars to a new world to insure their people's survival. During this time, the people of Morthrai detected an energy reading on Earth that, unknonwn to them, was the deployment of the first atomic bombs on Earth in 1945. The discovery motivated their leader, Tallick, to order that mining efforts be made on theie planet'a crystal reserves to power a starship to Earth. Malzor warned his leader that such mining could destabilize the planet's delicate ecosystem but Tallick ordered it anyway.
